Pay attention between 5.12 and 5.22. The vibe change totally. I mean totally. The lighting, the poses, the look, the eyes, the colors, the energy, the sexiness... I mean you can take 50 drastically different photos in just 20 seconds... we got to be more focus.. thanks Bronques
